summary: Testing of 2 features: (1) IV Solver / BlackScholesPanel in Settings drawer B-S CALC tab — all verified working. (2) Dark mode fix for TF selector and Yahoo button — both confirmed DARK (not white). All backend tests pass (10/10).
critical_code_review_comments: All implementations verified correct. No issues found.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified. B-S Calc tab in Settings drawer works. BS Calculator: 4 presets (NIFTY ATM, BANKNIFTY, RELIANCE, INFY), 6 inputs, CALCULATE button (yellow). Results show Call=₹205.03 (green box), Put=₹174.51 (red box), d1/d2/T values, all 5 Greeks (Delta, Gamma, Vega, Theta, Rho). IV Solver: CALL/PUT toggle, Market Price input, SOLVE IV button. With market_price=205 returns IV=13.9978% (~14%). Backend /api/black-scholes/iv-solver confirmed working. Dark mode: TF trigger bg=rgb(39,39,42) (zinc-800, dark), Yahoo active bg=rgb(82,82,91) (zinc-600, dark) - neither are white. RELIANCE stock loads via mousedown JS dispatch on search result button.

test_results_detail.iv_solver_panel: PASS - data-testid='iv-solver-panel' found, CALL/PUT toggle, market price input (data-testid='iv-market-price'), SOLVE IV button (data-testid='iv-solve-btn')

test_results_detail.dark_mode_yahoo_active: PASS - Yahoo active bg=rgb(82,82,91) = zinc-600 DARK, not white
